<!-- 
Please ensure your PR title follows Conventional Commits:
Example: feat(auth): add login form validation
-->

## Description
A clear and concise description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

## Related Issue
Closes #<!-- Link the issue number here (e.g. Closes #123) -->

## Type of Change
Select the Conventional Commit type that applies to this PR:
- [ ] `feat:` New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] `style:` Code style/UI formatting (changes that do not affect code logic)
- [ ] `refactor:` Code refactoring (structural change, no feature or fix)
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation updates only
- [ ] `perf:` Code change that improves performance

## How Has This Been Tested?
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions to reproduce.
- [ ] **Unit Tests:** `npm run test` (or equivalent) passes locally.
- [ ] **Manual Smoke Test:** Verified functionality across browsers/devices.

### Visual Evidence (Required for `style:` or `feat:` changes)
Add screenshots, GIFs, or video recordings demonstrating the UI updates or new behavior.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] My PR title follows the `type(scope): description` naming convention.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
